commands.command: cargo run -p nmp-app-podcast --bin provider-cassettes -- verify tests/fixtures/provider_cassettes

commands.summary: Generated 320 scenario pages with 7 cassettes, 11 mapped scenario refs, and 0 unmapped refs

notes: Replay mode fails closed on cassette misses instead of falling through to live provider calls.
Fixture metadata includes recorded latency, replay latency, 2026 premium-app budget, scenario references, and redaction markers.
Cassette scenario references now use generated BDD catalog IDs and the report links them to scenario pages.
